title: Firefly Trivia
description: You can't take the sky from me! Test your knowledge of the beloved Firefly verse.

questions.text: What type of ship is Serenity?
questions.explanation: Serenity is a Firefly-class transport ship, specifically an old Model 03-K64. Its worn condition is a recurring part of the show's charm.

questions.text: Who serves as Serenity's pilot?
questions.explanation: Wash is Serenity's pilot and Zoe's husband. He is known for his humor and excellent flying skills.

questions.text: What is Inara Serra's profession?
questions.explanation: Inara is a Companion, a highly trained and socially respected profession in the Core worlds. Her shuttle is docked with Serenity.

questions.text: Who is the doctor aboard Serenity?
questions.explanation: Simon Tam is a trauma surgeon who goes on the run to protect his sister River. He becomes the crew's medical expert.

questions.text: What is River Tam's relationship to Simon Tam?
questions.explanation: River is Simon's younger sister, and rescuing her from Alliance experiments drives his storyline. Their sibling bond is central to the series.

questions.text: What nickname is commonly used for soldiers who fought for Independence?
questions.explanation: Independents from the Unification War are often called Browncoats. Mal and Zoe are both veterans of that side.

questions.text: What is the name of Jayne Cobb's favorite rifle?
questions.explanation: Jayne lovingly names his customized rifle Vera. He references it in one of his most quoted lines from the show.

questions.text: In Firefly lore, who are the Reavers?
options: Violent, feral raiders from deep space
questions.explanation: Reavers are known for extreme brutality and terror across the outer worlds. Serenity later reveals their origin in the film.

questions.text: What role does Shepherd Book fill on Serenity?
questions.explanation: Book is a shepherd (pastor) with deep scriptural knowledge and a mysterious background. His hidden past is hinted at repeatedly.

questions.text: In Firefly slang, what does the word 'shiny' generally mean?
questions.explanation: 'Shiny' is a common positive expression meaning good, great, or okay. It's one of the show's most recognizable bits of slang.

questions.text: In the film Serenity, what chemical is revealed to have created most Reavers?
questions.explanation: Pax was a government-created behavior-modifying agent tested on Miranda. It made most people too passive to live and drove a fraction violently insane.

questions.text: On which planet was the Battle of Serenity Valley fought?
questions.explanation: Serenity Valley was on the planet Hera, where the Independents suffered a decisive defeat. Mal and Zoe fought there.

questions.text: Who is Zoe Alleyne Washburne married to?
questions.explanation: Zoe is married to Wash, Serenity's pilot. Their marriage adds heart and humor to many episodes.

questions.text: In 'The Train Job,' what does Mal decide to return after learning the truth?
questions.explanation: Mal returns the stolen medicine after realizing it is desperately needed by sick locals. This highlights his moral code despite being an outlaw.

questions.text: In 'Our Mrs. Reynolds,' who does Mal unexpectedly end up married to?
questions.explanation: Mal unknowingly enters a local marriage custom and becomes married to Saffron. She later proves to be a con artist.

questions.text: Eavesdown Docks, visited in the pilot episode, is located on which world?
questions.explanation: Eavesdown Docks is on Persephone and appears early in the series. It is one of the setting's memorable rough-and-tumble locations.

questions.text: Besides English, which language is frequently heard in Firefly dialogue and signage?
questions.explanation: Firefly's future culture blends English with Mandarin Chinese words and phrases. This linguistic mix is a defining worldbuilding element.

questions.text: In Serenity (2005), the Operative works for which governing power?
questions.explanation: The Operative is a loyal agent of the Alliance. He pursues River to suppress the Miranda secret.

questions.text: Which bounty hunter boards Serenity in the episode 'Objects in Space'?
questions.explanation: Jubal Early infiltrates Serenity to capture River. The episode is known for its tense, psychological tone.

questions.text: Which line from the theme song became one of Firefly's most famous phrases?
options: You can't take the sky from me
questions.explanation: 'You can't take the sky from me' appears in the opening theme and became an iconic Firefly motto. It captures the show's spirit of stubborn freedom.
